characters.appearance: Young adult female of South Asian descent, medium build, brown complexion. She has long, wavy dark hair, wears glasses, and has a nose ring.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue button-down shirt with subtle embroidery along the placket.

characters.appearance: Adult male, Caucasian, medium build. He has short brown hair and a clean-shaven face.
Humanoid robot from the chest up. It has a smooth, white, metallic face with blue eyes and a glowing blue circular light on its chest.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मेरे colleagues को लगता है कि मुझे English नहीं आती, और वो मेरे accent का मज़ाक उड़ाते थे। [My colleagues think I don't know English, and they used to make fun of my accent.]
Character A says: चलिए आज उनका reaction देखते हैं। [Let's see their reaction today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable workplace insecurity (being mocked for poor English).
- Sets up a satisfying revenge/reveal dynamic.
- Establishes the protagonist as someone who took secret action to improve.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: मेरे colleagues को लगता है कि मुझे English नहीं आती, और वो मेरे accent का मज़ाक उड़ाते थे। चलिए आज उनका reaction देखते हैं। Supernova.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: I'd like to propose a different approach to this project. [I'd like to propose a different approach to this project.]
Character B says: Wait, what did you say? [Wait, what did you say?]
Character A says: A different approach. [A different approach.]
Character B says: Wow, तुम्हारी English इतनी improve कैसे हो गई? [Wow, how did your English improve so much?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the payoff of the hook: the protagonist speaking fluent, confident English in a professional setting.
- Shows the tangible benefit of the app (colleague's impressed reaction).
- Transitions the focus from the problem to the solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: I'd like to propose a different approach to this project. Wait, what did you say? A different approach. Wow, तुम्हारी English इतनी improve कैसे हो गई? Supernova.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: याद है lunch के बाद मैं हमेशा अपने phone पर होती थी? [Remember I was always on my phone after lunch?]
Character A says: मैं Instagram scroll नहीं कर रही थी, मैं Supernova पर English practice कर रही थी। [I wasn't scrolling Instagram, I was practicing English on Supernova.]
Character A says: ये बिल्कुल एक personal English tutor की तरह है। [It's exactly like a personal English tutor.]
Character A says: रुको, मैं दिखाती हूँ। [Wait, let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the brand name (Supernova) as the secret to her success.
- Positions the app as a productive alternative to doomscrolling.
- Sets up the product demonstration.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: याद है lunch के बाद मैं हमेशा अपने phone पर होती थी? मैं Instagram scroll नहीं कर रही थी, मैं Supernova पर English practice कर रही थी। ये बिल्कुल एक personal English tutor की तरह है। रुको, मैं दिखाती हूँ। Supernova.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: क्या आप भी बिना डरे, confidently English बोलना चाहते हैं? [Do you also want to speak English confidently, without fear?]
Character C says: Supernova के AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करें, जो बोलते समय आपकी गलतियाँ सुधारेगा। [Practice daily with Supernova's AI tutor, which corrects your mistakes while you speak.]
Character C says: चलिए साथ में try करते हैं। [Let's try it together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Directly addresses the viewer's desire for confidence.
- Explains the core feature: an AI tutor that corrects mistakes in real-time.
- Invites the user into a live demo.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: क्या आप भी बिना डरे, confidently English बोलना चाहते हैं? Supernova के AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करें, जो बोलते समय आपकी गलतियाँ सुधारेगा। चलिए साथ में try करते हैं। Supernova. SPEAK ENGLISH CONFIDENTLY!

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: A little bit. [A little bit.]
Character C says: Where do you live? [Where do you live?]
Character A says: I am Delhi. [I am Delhi.]
Character C says: Almost. You should say, I live in Delhi. [Almost. You should say, I live in Delhi.]
Character A says: मैं हमेशा ये mix up कर देती हूँ। [I always mix this up.]
Character C says: कोई बात नहीं। इसीलिए मैं यहाँ हूँ, ताकि आप सही English बोल सकें। [No problem. That is exactly why I am here, so you can speak correct English.]
Character A says: पर private tutor तो बहुत महँगे होते हैं ना? [But private tutors are very expensive, right?]
Character C says: Supernova के साथ नहीं। ये बहुत ही affordable है। [Not with Supernova. It is very affordable.]
Character C says: महँगे courses की तरह आपको हज़ारों रुपये खर्च करने की ज़रूरत नहीं है। [Unlike expensive courses, you don't need to spend thousands of rupees.]
Character A says: Are you serious? [Are you serious?]
Character C says: Absolutely. यहाँ आपको मिलेगी real conversation practice, आपके AI tutor के साथ। [Absolutely. Here you will get real conversation practice, with your AI tutor.]
Character A says: Like, a real tutor? [Like, a real tutor?]
Character C says: Yes. मैं आपकी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करूँगा, ताकि आप confidence के साथ बोल सकें। [Yes. I will correct your grammar and pronunciation, so you can speak with confidence.]
Character A says: Okay. मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। [Okay. I am going to download Supernova right now.]
Character C says: Great decision. Let's speak English together. [Great decision. Let's speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core loop: user speaks, makes a common mistake, AI corrects gently.
- Overcomes the price objection by framing Supernova as an affordable alternative to expensive private tutors.
- Reinforces the warm, encouraging tone of the AI tutor.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Do you speak English? A little bit. Where do you live? I am Delhi. Almost. You should say, I live in Delhi. मैं हमेशा ये mix up कर देती हूँ। कोई बात नहीं। इसीलिए मैं यहाँ हूँ, ताकि आप सही English बोल सकें। पर private tutor तो बहुत महँगे होते हैं ना? Supernova के साथ नहीं। ये बहुत ही affordable है। महँगे courses की तरह आपको हज़ारों रुपये खर्च करने की ज़रूरत नहीं है। Are you serious? Absolutely. यहाँ आपको मिलेगी real conversation practice, आपके AI tutor के साथ। Like, a real tutor? Yes. मैं आपकी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करूँगा, ताकि आप confidence के साथ बोल सकें। Okay. मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। Great decision. Let's speak English together. Supernova.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: आज ही Supernova download करें और confidently English बोलें। [Download Supernova today and speak English confidently.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final Call to Action.
- Displays app store availability.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: DOWNLOAD NOW! START PRACTICING. Supernova. Download on the App Store. GET IT ON Google Play.
